meta.title: EasiestClaw - AI Virtual Company
meta.description: A human-friendly OpenClaw shell that lets non-programmers direct an AI team as naturally as chat.

nav.changeMyAvatarDescription: After you confirm, a file picker opens and the selected image replaces your current avatar immediately.

descriptions.models: Add AI providers and configure available models
descriptions.gateway: Configure OpenClaw gateway connection URL and access token
descriptions.language: Follow the browser language by default, with manual override available
descriptions.storage: Customize data storage location to save system drive space
descriptions.community: Join the official WeChat group for updates and support

community.title: Official Community
community.description: Scan the QR code below to join the EasiestClaw official WeChat group

language.systemDescription: Use your browser's preferred language on first visit

storage.restartHint: Changing the data directory requires an app restart. OpenClaw will need to be re-extracted at the new location (~1-2 minutes).
storage.restored: Restored to default. Please restart the app.

newConversation.title: Choose a teammate to start chatting

createAgent.gatewayUnavailable: Gateway unavailable. Please try again later.
createAgent.createFailed: Failed to create the agent. Please try again.
createAgent.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
createAgent.title: Create New Agent
createAgent.description: Add a new AI teammate to your virtual company
createAgent.modelHelper: Default model pre-selected. You can switch to another.
createAgent.noModelsDesc: Add a model provider (e.g. Anthropic, OpenAI) and enter an API key before creating agents.

groupCreate.title: Create New Group
groupCreate.purposePlaceholder: Plan and coordinate the Q2 product launch, including market analysis, copywriting, data support, and scheduling
groupCreate.purposeHelper: Purpose helps teammates understand the collaboration context
groupCreate.workspaceHelper: All members will work in this directory. Leave blank to use each agent's default workspace.

chatWindow.emptyTitle: Choose a conversation to start chatting
chatWindow.emptyDescription: Or click "New conversation" to talk with your team
chatWindow.notConnectedDesc: Connect to start chatting with agents

placeholders.withAttachments: Add a message or keep pasting images...
placeholders.default: Type a message... Enter to send, Shift+Enter for a new line, image paste supported

messageInput.imageTooLarge: Image exceeds 10 MB — please compress it first
messageInput.filePathUnavailable: Cannot read file path — please use the file picker instead

header.dissolveGroupConfirm: Are you sure you want to dissolve "{{name}}"? All message history will be cleared.
header.deleteAgentDescription: Are you sure you want to delete "{{name}}"? This removes the agent and its workspace data permanently.
header.deleteFailed: Failed to delete the agent. Please try again.
header.networkError: Network error. Please check your connection and try again.
header.uploadSupport: Supports JPG, PNG, WebP up to 2MB

groupMembers.title: Members ({{count}})
groupMembers.maxResponders: Up to {{count}} members respond each round
groupMembers.noAvailableMembers: All agents are already in this group

modelConfig.searchPlaceholder: Search models (filter by ID or name)
modelConfig.noProviders: No providers yet, please add one
modelConfig.deleteConfirm: Are you sure you want to delete provider "{{name}}"? This action cannot be undone until you save.
modelConfig.editProviderDesc: Configure provider connection and manage model list
modelConfig.addProviderDesc: Choose a known AI provider for quick setup, or create a custom one

skill-match.label: Smart Match
skill-match.description: Automatically route each question to the most relevant members

coordinator.label: Coordinator
coordinator.description: Let one coordinator analyze the task and assign the best responders

round-robin.label: Round Robin
round-robin.description: Members take turns answering each request

all.label: All Respond
all.description: Every member replies to every request

openclawPanel.title: OpenClaw Status
openclawPanel.noAgents: No agents found. Please connect to OpenClaw first.

onboarding.title: Welcome to EasiestClaw AI
onboarding.subtitle: Quick setup so your AI team knows who you are
onboarding.gatewayStartingDesc: First launch may take a few seconds. If a firewall prompt appears, click "Allow"
onboarding.upgradeDesc: This app update includes a new version of OpenClaw. Would you like to upgrade? This will re-extract the runtime files (about 1–2 minutes).
onboarding.dataLocationDesc: OpenClaw runtime data is ~500MB. Choose a drive with enough space.
onboarding.dataLocationChooseHint: Click to browse and select a folder
onboarding.dataLocationDefaultHint: Data will be stored in the system app data directory
onboarding.modelCheckDesc: No model configuration detected. You need to configure at least one AI model to use the app.
onboarding.modelCheckSkipHint: You can configure models anytime in Settings

windowControls.closeConfirmDesc: Closing the window will stop all AI team tasks. Are you sure you want to exit?

workspace.title: Workspace
workspace.emptyFile: File is empty. Type something and save.

channels.title: Channels
channels.description: Configure external messaging channels (Feishu, Telegram, etc.) to connect your AI team to more platforms
channels.restartHint: Restart OpenClaw for changes to take effect

feishu.name: Feishu
feishu.setupHint: Go to open.feishu.cn/app to create an app and get App ID & App Secret. WebSocket connection is recommended.

telegram.name: Telegram
telegram.setupHint: Find @BotFather on Telegram, send /newbot to create a bot and get the token.

skills.title: Skills
skills.subtitle: Global skills management
skills.exploreHint: Search for skills on ClawHub marketplace
skills.malwareBlocked: This skill has been blocked for malware
skills.suspicious: This skill has been flagged as suspicious
